retrieval_notes: Google Scholar author profile was read through the in-app browser on 2026-06-27.
Visible profile rows were collected with pagesize=100: cstart=0 returned 100 rows, cstart=100 returned 100 rows, cstart=200 returned 36 rows, and cstart=300 returned no real additional entries.
The regular Scholar search results page may block automated access; this manifest tracks the visible author-profile bibliography, not an authoritative complete works list.
policy: Bibliographic tracking only; not corpus text. Do not create corpus Markdown, run OCR, read PDF text layers, DjVuTXT, hOCR, ABBYY, or derived text from this manifest alone.
